name: bytes
description: Specialist subagents, engineering-discipline skills, and workflow commands for Claude Code. The Claude Code member of the blackbytes family: a skeptical read-only Oracle consult, a gated multi-source Librarian, routing-cost and verification-honesty disciplines, plus ported workflow commands (commit-and-push, review-fresh-eyes, suggest-innovation, update-docs). Ships only what Claude Code lacks natively.
